title: pouzolzia abyssinica
intro: Pouzolzia abyssinica, also known as Abyssinian woodrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pouzolzia abyssinica include treating fever, pain, and digestive issues, as well as providing protection against certain diseases. Pouzolzia abyssinica is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and its leaves and roots are sometimes used in traditional medicine preparations.
